programs.title: Blowback
programs.desc: (2022) Tense thriller with Randy Couture. After he's sabotaged by those closest to him during a bullet-ridden heist, a brilliant thief manages to survive - and vows to kill everyone who betrayed him.

programs.title: Bunraku
programs.desc: (2010) Martial arts action with Josh Hartnett and Woody Harrelson. A mysterious drifter, a bartender and a young samurai join up against a ruthless leader and deadly assassins.

programs.title: Big Kill
programs.desc: (2019) Modern western with Jason Patric and Danny Trejo. Two misfit gamblers on the run, a tenderfoot and a deadly preacher team up for a date with destiny in a boom town gone bust.

programs.title: The Quick And The Dead
programs.desc: (1963) War drama starring Victor French and Majel Barrett. With the aid of local partisans, a group of American soldiers try to make it through enemy-occupied Italy to safety.

programs.title: Air Rescue
programs.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.
